general.name: Setup Island Extension on Brave Browser
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2F5834AB-94C8-4796-B97C-C8C7CD8557A1</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2F5834AB-94C8-4796-B97C-C8C7CD8557A1</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Setup Island Extension on Brave Browser</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>304AFCD1-BCB7-45F0-91B9-D2CBE8B3B71B</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>304AFCD1-BCB7-45F0-91B9-D2CBE8B3B71B</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.brave.Browser.extensions.oedggboaecbkcpnmkmdglidmfblggplg</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>accessToken</key><string>eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..7KrDojze_bZ5ryNF4MMlx_J4ZqH8Lx4MYE9cm1M0Cok</string><key>machineId</key><string>$SERIALNUMBER</string><key>machineName</key><string>$COMPUTERNAME</string><key>osUsername</key><string>$USERNAME</string><key>region</key><string>Global</string><key>serialNumber</key><string>$SERIALNUMBER</string><key>macAddresses</key><array><string>$MACADDRESS</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom
